name: ErrorRate
query: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /ERROR/ | stats count() as errors by bin(5m)

name: SlowRequests
query: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /duration/ | parse @message /duration=(?<dur>[0-9.]+)/ | filter dur > 1000 | sort dur desc | limit 20

name: ClaimEvents
query: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /claim_vested/ | stats count() by bin(1h)
